examples: She wore this woolly hat with pompoms.
Winona was now comfortably enfolded in a woolly dressing-gown.
The woolly hat and padded hood are no match for minus 43C either, and my ears begin to sting.
One image even shows a woolly rhino, one of the only examples in prehistoric art.
When Pavlo went out into the field to dun the debtors, he found a wild and woolly world.
